title: Kidplokio 2pc Space Toy Bundle Blue Blaster and Superhero Cinch Bag Boys 3 Up
description:
Does your child love all things space and superheroes? This Kidplokio Space Blaster and Cinch Bag Bundle set is a great gift idea this holiday season! The space blaster toy features flashing colorful lights and fantastic blasting sound effects, and the superhero-themed cinch bag comes with an easy-to-use drawstring cinch closure for on-the-go fun. As defenders of our solar system and unknown galaxies beyond, kids will need the Kidplokio Sonic Space Blaster to keep pretend play space missions running at top speed! Aliens and evil galactic villains won’t stand a chance! Each drawstring tote bag measures 18” by 13” and can easily hold your child’s school supplies and sporting gear like binders, school books, notebooks, accessories, and a water bottle

Kidplokio 2pc Space Toy Bundle Blue Blaster and Superhero Cinch Bag Boys 3 Up

Does your child love all things space and superheroes? This Kidplokio Space Blaster and Cinch Bag Bundle set is a great gift idea this holiday season! The space blaster toy features flashing colorful lights and fantastic blasting sound effects, and the superhero-themed cinch bag comes with an easy-to-use drawstring cinch closure for on-the-go fun.

Key Features

  • BLASTER TOY AND BACKPACK BUNDLE - Kidplokio Space Blaster and Backpack bundle comes with a cool light-up space blaster toy and a superhero-themed cinch bag for boys; Blaster fits inside a travel bag for on-the-go adventures
  • SONIC SPACE BLASTER TOY - As defenders of our solar system and unknown galaxies beyond, kids will need the Kidplokio Sonic Space Blaster to keep pretend play space missions running at top speed! Featuring flashing colorful lights and fantastic blasting sound effects, aliens and evil galactic villains won’t stand a chance!
  • LARGE CAPACITY BAG - Drawstring tote bag measures 18” and can easily hold children’s school supplies and sporting gear. Kids can securely carry their binders, notebooks, school books, and water bottles to and from school, sports practice, and play dates
  • DURABLE MATERIAL - Cinch backpacks are made of durable, water-resistant polyester to protect your child’s back-to-school materials and supplies even in inclement weather; Robot toy is made of plastic that can be easily wiped down and air-dried in between uses to keep it clean
  • SPECIFICATIONS - 2pc bundle gift set (space blaster and cinch bag); Colors: assorted; Recommended age: 3+ years; No assembly required (space blaster); Batteries included

Product Specifications

  • MPN: KPL2PCSB
  • UPC: 810058485410
  • Color: Blue
  • Size: 2pc

As defenders of our solar system and unknown galaxies beyond, kids will need the Kidplokio Sonic Space Blaster to keep pretend play space missions running at top speed! Aliens and evil galactic villains won’t stand a chance!

Each drawstring tote bag measures 18” by 13” and can easily hold your child’s school supplies and sporting gear like binders, school books, notebooks, accessories, and a water bottle. The bag features an easy-to-use cinch closure to ensure supplies stay secured in the bag when not in use.

The adjustable cinch strap design provides customizable comfort that will fit most kids. The bag itself is made of durable water-resistant polyester to protect your child’s school materials and supplies rain or shine.
